daily.today_energy: The cosmos is serving main character energy today, Leo. You're radiating confidence and magnetism—people are literally drawn to your vibe. Channel this into something meaningful rather than just existing loudly.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your partner's noticing the glow-up. If you're single, someone's definitely clocking you today, but the real magic is in how good you feel about yourself first. That's the real flex.
daily.career: Your ideas hit different right now. Don't sleep on that creative thought that keeps popping up—it's worth developing. Your boss or team is more receptive to your vision than usual. Trust the momentum.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement today, whether that's dancing, a gym sesh, or just walking around feeling yourself. Energy levels are peak. Honor that by actually doing something active instead of just planning to later.
